author: doll-agent
content:
Plan: three logical commits + verify publishability.

1. feat(bayes): add conjugate priors module — bumps ferrolearn-bayes to 0.2.1, adds src/conjugate.rs (Normal-Normal closed-form posterior with NormalNormalPosterior + posterior_normal_normal), proptest-regressions/conjugate.txt, exports pub mod conjugate in lib.rs, updates Cargo.toml description+keywords. Adds 0.2.1 release section to CHANGELOG. This unblocks the conjugate entry currently sitting in [Unreleased] from being shippable.

2. style: cargo fmt + clippy auto-fixes — non-functional formatting collapses + lint auto-fixes across 40+ files in 8 crates (bayes, bench, cluster, decomp, linear, metrics, model-sel, neighbors, preprocess, tree). Net diff: -317 lines (762 removed, 445 added). No changelog entry — pure style.

3. docs(changelog): retrofit batch 1-5 features — backfills the 17 already-shipped entries that batch 1-5 commits added without CHANGELOG updates.

Verification: cargo build -p ferrolearn-bayes; cargo test -p ferrolearn-bayes; cargo publish -p ferrolearn-bayes --dry-run.

Skipping config drift (.claude/, .crosslink/, .gitignore, .mcp.json) — agent infrastructure, not project code.
